meta.title: Automatic Recovery At Level 0
meta.description: Jens Meggers proposes something unique, automatic recovery at Level 0 of the Purdue Model on S4x23's Stage 2. After setting the stage and some scenarios where this would be most valuable and how data between Level 0 and 1 is monitored, the technical solution and automated recovery options are described at 11:50.
